title: ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 05 Junior Operation Manager and other Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of Junior Operation Manager and Fireman Cim Liftman Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the MBBS, BDS, or 10th Pass can grab this chance and apply for the ACTREC Recruitment 2026 . Here we includedthe ae limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more,...
